title: Poland’s drug security remains dangerously dependent on Asia [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: A new policy paper warns Poland remains heavily reliant on Asian pharmaceutical supply chains despite growing concerns over European drug security and strategic resilience
summary_public: A new policy paper warns Poland remains heavily reliant on Asian pharmaceutical supply chains despite growing concerns over European drug security and strategic resilience

PL.label: negative
PL.evidence: Poland’s drug security remains dangerously dependent on Asia
